name: Metric Consistency
statement: Distance calculations must be consistent with the specified metric type (L2, IP, COSINE)
rationale: Users expect mathematically correct distance calculations
invariants: Distance calculation is deterministic and matches metric definition

cases.name: L2 metric correctness
cases.verification: manually compute L2 distance for first result

cases.name: Cosine metric correctness
cases.verification: manually compute cosine distance for first result

cases.name: IP metric correctness
cases.verification: manually compute IP for first result

oracle.verification: expected = compute_metric(metric_type, result.vector, query); assert abs(result.distance - expected) < 1e-6
